sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
# Get top bar items (20 pixels each)
top_items = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 20]
print("Top bar items (20px):")
for n in top_items:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  color={n['color']} center=({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})")

# Sort by column to get left-to-right order
top_items_sorted = sorted(top_items, key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
print("\nTop bar left-to-right:", [n['color'] for n in top_items_sorted])

# Upper box items (16 pixels)
upper_items = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 16 and 20 <= sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']) <= 25]
upper_sorted = sorted(upper_items, key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
print("\nUpper box left-to-right:", [(n['color'], sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])) for n in upper_sorted])

# Lower box items (16 pixels)
lower_items = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 16 and 30 <= sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary']) <= 40]
lower_sorted = sorted(lower_items, key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
print("\nLower box left-to-right:", [(n['color'], sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])) for n in lower_sorted])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
